name: Amplitude Healthcare Acquisition Corporation
summary: Amplitude Healthcare Acquisition Corporation does not have significant operations. It focuses on effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or related business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus on the life sciences and pharmaceutical services sectors in the United States and Europe. Amplitude Healthcare Acquisition Corporation was incorporated in 2019 and is based in New York, New York.
